title: quercus × fontqueri
intro: Quercus × fontqueri, a hybrid of the Quercus ilex and Quercus faginea, is a type of evergreen oak tree known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus × fontqueri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
